prompt: Real on-model portrait photograph, natural window light, mirrorless camera, shallow depth of field. A person wearing a premium heavyweight black pullover hoodie. A small orange AITX open-arms mark embroidered on the left chest. A thin NVIDIA-green #76b900 stitch accent along the cuff. On the lower sleeve, tiny plain neutral text reads "AITX in collaboration with NVIDIA". Relaxed premium streetwear, neutral warm backdrop. IMPORTANT LOGO RULES: The ONLY logo anywhere is the orange AITX open-arms mark (a friendly figure with open arms, AITX orange #ff4201, from the passed reference image). Do NOT render the NVIDIA logo, the NVIDIA eye/GPU icon, or any NVIDIA wordmark graphic. The word 'NVIDIA' may appear ONLY as very small, plain, neutral sans-serif text as a collaboration credit, set apart from the AITX mark (like a discreet tag or hem credit), never stylized as a brand logo and never combined with the AITX mark. NVIDIA green #76b900 appears only as a small accent detail; AITX orange leads.
